title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies a user can authenticate with valid credentials and land on the main dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main dashboard is displayed

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard financial summary cards are displayed
Verify installment or creditor alerts are displayed

title: Sell a car and move it to the sold list

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an available car for sale
Fill in the buyer and payment details with valid values
Verify the car no longer appears in available inventory
Verify the car appears in the sold cars list
